content.problemStatement:
You are given a binary string SSS of size NNN, and a parameter KKK.

You are wondering whether it is possible to rearrange the characters in SSS such that the following condition is satisfied:


Si‚â†Si+KS_i \ne S_{i + K}Si‚ÄãÓÄ†=Si+K‚Äã for all 1‚â§i‚â§N‚àíK1 \le i \le N - K1‚â§i‚â§N‚àíK
Print Yes\text{Yes}Yes if it is possible to rearrange SSS in such a way, and No\text{No}No otherwise.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of two lines of input.

The first line of each test case contains 222 space-separated integers - NNN and KKK.
The second line contains a binary string SSS.




Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line Yes\text{Yes}Yes if it is possible to rearrange the binary string accordingly and No\text{No}No otherwise.


You may output each character in either case, for example YES\text{YES}YES, yes\text{yes}yes and yES\text{yES}yES will all be accepted as a positive response.
